indicators.name: yoga mat on floor
indicators.rationale: A yoga mat is present, but it is not unrolled and ready for use.

indicators.name: open floor space
indicators.rationale: There is enough open space to accommodate a yoga mat and some stretching exercises.

indicators.name: hardwood flooring
indicators.rationale: Hardwood flooring is suitable for yoga practice as it provides a stable and non-slip surface.

indicators.name: minimal furniture
indicators.rationale: The presence of minimal furniture does not obstruct the open floor space.

indicators.name: natural light from windows
indicators.rationale: Natural light can create a calming atmosphere conducive to yoga practice.

reasoning_summary: The scene is marginally adequate for yoga / stretching due to the presence of a yoga mat and open floor space, but the mat is not ready for use and the room is not fully optimized for the activity.
